user.title: Connect to PS4 GoldHEN Add-on
user.description: Enter the details for your PS4 GoldHEN add-on and PS4 console. Make sure the add-on is installed and running first.

data_description.addon_url: URL of the GoldHEN add-on (e.g. http://192.168.x.x:8787)

error.addon_not_reachable: Cannot reach the PS4 GoldHEN add-on. Check the URL and make sure the add-on is running.

init.title: PS4 GoldHEN Settings
init.description: Update the connection settings for your PS4 GoldHEN add-on.

data_description.addon_url: URL of the GoldHEN add-on (e.g. http://192.168.x.x:8787)

error.addon_not_reachable: Cannot reach the PS4 GoldHEN add-on. Check the URL and make sure the add-on is running.
